# Third-party notices

## Node.js Mobile 24.5.0

Copyright Node.js contributors and the Node.js Mobile contributors.

The primary Node.js license is MIT. Complete upstream notices are retained in the verified RuntimeCore bundle produced from the pinned source.

Official source and license: <https://github.com/heylogin/nodejs-mobile/tree/v24.5.0-mobile>

## Embedded host dependencies

The host uses the exact versions in `AI_HLY/Downstream/RuntimeCore/Node/Host/package-lock.json`. Each package's license file is retained inside the generated `RuntimeHostResources.zip`:

- `@npmcli/arborist` 8.0.5
- `pacote` 20.0.1
- `semver` 7.8.5
- `ssri` 12.0.0
- `typescript` 6.0.3

The host declares and verifies embedded Node 24.5.0.
